title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Japanese Derby has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even Maruzensky can't hide her unease as the
echoing cheers of the spectators welcome her
onto the course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She steels her nerves and heads to the track,
ready to enjoy the greatest race in Japan.
